channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Getting Along Very Well": Trump Sees Progress As US, Iran Hold Qatar Talks

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump said Wednesday that indirect talks with Iran in Qatar were making progress.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that indirect talks with Iran in Qatar were making progress, offering a tentative sign that diplomacy was holding after recent exchanges of fire threatened efforts to end the Middle East war.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that indirect talks with Iran in Qatar were making progress, offering a tentative sign that diplomacy was holding after recent exchanges of fire threatened efforts to end the Middle East war.

item.title: Alibaba To Pay $600 Million To Settle US Charges It Allowed Illegal Drug

media:content.media:description: Alibaba operates some of world's largest e-commerce platforms, including Alibaba.com and AliExpress.com.

item.description: The US alleges that Alibaba's US-based payment processor, AUS Merchant Services, violated federal law by failing to prevent merchants from selling and importing illegal products into the US through Alibaba.com and AliExpress.com.
item.content:encoded: The US alleges that Alibaba's US-based payment processor, AUS Merchant Services, violated federal law by failing to prevent merchants from selling and importing illegal products into the US through Alibaba.com and AliExpress.com.

item.title: More Than 2 Million Military Casualties In Ukraine War: Report

media:content.media:description: Ukrainian forces have meanwhile suffered between 525,000 and 625,000 casualties.

item.description: Russia-Ukraine War: It estimated that between 400,000 and 450,000 Russians have been killed since Moscow invaded Ukraine in February 2022, out of a total of 1.4 million casualties -- killed, wounded and missing -- among Russian troops.
item.content:encoded: Russia-Ukraine War: It estimated that between 400,000 and 450,000 Russians have been killed since Moscow invaded Ukraine in February 2022, out of a total of 1.4 million casualties -- killed, wounded and missing -- among Russian troops.

item.title: 5.5 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Afghanistan

media:content.media:description: There were no immediate reports of damage or casualties following the earthquake.

item.description: Afghanistan frequently experiences earthquakes, particularly in the Hindu Kush region, which lies in a highly active seismic zone, according to the Red Cross.
item.content:encoded: Afghanistan frequently experiences earthquakes, particularly in the Hindu Kush region, which lies in a highly active seismic zone, according to the Red Cross.

item.title: "Unbreakable Alliance": US Signs Deal To Build Permanent Embassy In Jerusalem

media:content.media:description: US ambassador Mike Huckabee and Israeli Foreign Minister Gidon Sa'ar attend a formal signing ceremony.

item.description: US ambassador Mike Huckabee said during a signing ceremony at Israel's foreign ministry that Washington "recognises Jerusalem as the eternal, indigenous, and forever capital of the Jewish people".
item.content:encoded: US ambassador Mike Huckabee said during a signing ceremony at Israel's foreign ministry that Washington "recognises Jerusalem as the eternal, indigenous, and forever capital of the Jewish people".

item.title: 1 Missing As US Seahawk Helicopter Makes Emergency Landing In Arabian Sea

media:content.media:description: Helicopter water landings can be dangerous, even for experienced pilots

item.description: US forces in the region are also on high alert amid periodic flare-ups in violence during the ceasefire between the US and Iran.
item.content:encoded: US forces in the region are also on high alert amid periodic flare-ups in violence during the ceasefire between the US and Iran.

item.title: Trump Took In About $1.2 Billion From Crypto Businesses Last Year

media:content.media:description: Trump also took in millions last year from selling Trump-branded Bibles, sneakers and other small items

item.description: Trump also took in millions last year from selling Trump-branded Bibles, sneakers and other small items in another unprecedented move for the presidency. The sale of Trump-branded watches alone brought in $4.7 million.
item.content:encoded: Trump also took in millions last year from selling Trump-branded Bibles, sneakers and other small items in another unprecedented move for the presidency. The sale of Trump-branded watches alone brought in $4.7 million.

item.title: Trump Nearly Went Back To War With Iran To 'Finish The Job': Report

media:content.media:description: Trump has continued to meet both formally and informally with his top defence team on Iran

item.description: Trump held several conversations with Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine about whether Washington should walk away from negotiations and return to a broader military campaign against Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Trump held several conversations with Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine about whether Washington should walk away from negotiations and return to a broader military campaign against Tehran.

item.title: Satellite Data Shows Over 58,000 Buildings Damaged Or Destroyed in Venezuela Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Around 27 countries have mobilised nearly 40 search and rescue teams.

item.description: More than 1,900 people were killed, 10,500 injured and thousands remain missing following the earthquakes.
item.content:encoded: More than 1,900 people were killed, 10,500 injured and thousands remain missing following the earthquakes.

item.title: German Prosecutors Charge Suspect In Nord Stream Pipeline Sabotage

media:content.media:description: Kuznietsov is thought to have been in command on the yacht used to carry out the operation

item.description: Federal prosecutors confirmed that a man had been charged over the explosion, with German media reporting that he was a Ukrainian national said to be the head of the team that carried out the operation.
item.content:encoded: Federal prosecutors confirmed that a man had been charged over the explosion, with German media reporting that he was a Ukrainian national said to be the head of the team that carried out the operation.

item.title: A Peek Inside Trump's $400 Million Qatar-Gifted Air Force One On Debut Trip

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump told reporters that he was proud of the luxurious plane

item.description: Reporters are generally not permitted to take photos on the plane unless US President Donald Trump is present. But on Wednesday, Trump administration staffers posted images of the plane's interior on social media.
item.content:encoded: Reporters are generally not permitted to take photos on the plane unless US President Donald Trump is present. But on Wednesday, Trump administration staffers posted images of the plane's interior on social media.

item.title: "Everybody's Profiting": Trump Defends Earning More Than $1 Billion On Crypto

media:content.media:description: The White House said he had "proudly made the United States the crypto capital of the world"

item.description: Asked about criticisms that he was using his position to enrich himself, the billionaire president said his earnings were placed in blind trusts to ensure that he could not do so.
item.content:encoded: Asked about criticisms that he was using his position to enrich himself, the billionaire president said his earnings were placed in blind trusts to ensure that he could not do so.

item.title: Why These Cities And Shrines Were Chosen For Ali Khamenei's Funeral Journey

media:content.media:description: The funeral procession through the streets of Tehran represents a final farewell

item.description: From the seat of power in Tehran to the Shia holy cities of Qom, Karbala, Najaf and finally Mashhad, each stop holds symbolic importance.
item.content:encoded: From the seat of power in Tehran to the Shia holy cities of Qom, Karbala, Najaf and finally Mashhad, each stop holds symbolic importance.

item.title: India's Leading Position In Global Remittance Market Driven By US, UAE

media:content.media:description: Remittances are the funds or goods that migrants transfer directly to their households

item.description: Remittances are recognised as one of the most stable and dependable components of external financing. They remain remarkably well-insulated from broader financial market volatility and geopolitical uncertainty.
item.content:encoded: Remittances are recognised as one of the most stable and dependable components of external financing. They remain remarkably well-insulated from broader financial market volatility and geopolitical uncertainty.

item.title: No Names, No Faces, No Phones: Secret Lives Of Ukraine's Shadow Drone Unit

media:content.media:description: The Ukrainian strikes have triggered a fuel crisis across much of Russia.

item.description: The retaliatory attacks on Russian military sites and oil refineries they carry out have embarrassed President Vladimir Putin, who four years ago thought he could capture Kyiv in a matter of days.
item.content:encoded: The retaliatory attacks on Russian military sites and oil refineries they carry out have embarrassed President Vladimir Putin, who four years ago thought he could capture Kyiv in a matter of days.

item.title: Who Really Runs Iran Now, After Ali Khamenei's Death

media:content.media:description: Khamenei's son Mojtaba was named supreme leader after his death.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said last month that the war had removed a "first set" and "second set" of leaders but maintained that the "third set" was "smart", "very rational" and "not radicalised".
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said last month that the war had removed a "first set" and "second set" of leaders but maintained that the "third set" was "smart", "very rational" and "not radicalised".

item.title: Israel Says Troops Will Stay In Lebanon, Syria, Gaza "Until Further Notice"

media:content.media:description: In Gaza, Israeli forces occupy nearly 70 per cent of the territory.

item.description: Israel and Lebanon signed a US-sponsored framework agreement on Friday to pave the way for peace between the two countries and disarm Iran-backed group Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Lebanon signed a US-sponsored framework agreement on Friday to pave the way for peace between the two countries and disarm Iran-backed group Hezbollah.

item.title: "Very Good Meetings": Trump On US-Iran Talks In Doha

media:content.media:description: The US leader said there had been "very good meetings" in Doha.

item.description: The US leader said there had been "very good meetings" in Doha after an early dispute over the format threatened to overshadow discussions.
item.content:encoded: The US leader said there had been "very good meetings" in Doha after an early dispute over the format threatened to overshadow discussions.

item.title: End Of An Era: Sony To Stop Releasing Playstation Games On Discs In 2028

media:content.media:description: Sony began its move towards digital downloads in 2020.

item.description: In practice, that means gamers will have to download directly from Sony's PlayStation Store or will obtain a download code when purchasing a title from a retailer.
item.content:encoded: In practice, that means gamers will have to download directly from Sony's PlayStation Store or will obtain a download code when purchasing a title from a retailer.

item.title: Trump Committed To Muzzling Pets In Israel: Iran After Khamenei Death Threat

media:content.media:description: Araghchi, in a warning to Israel, has said that they will "school" them

item.description: In a post on X, Iran's foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi wrote that in the Islamabad memorandum of understanding, the president of the US has committed to "muzzling its pets in Tel Aviv".
item.content:encoded: In a post on X, Iran's foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi wrote that in the Islamabad memorandum of understanding, the president of the US has committed to "muzzling its pets in Tel Aviv".
